prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-MSFEW-BOAT-WHISTLE-4PK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: (2 Pack) Boat Whistle Loud Floating Emergency Safety Whistle for Boating Description: When on the water a safety whisttle for boating is important to carry and is a must-have emergency accessory. The ASR Outdoor Floating Emergency Whistle is a very loud emergency signaling device that will aid you in the event of an emergency.

These whistles are constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that won't rust or corrode, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it's lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time, rain, or shine.

The lightweight plastic whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate them during an emergency in case you drop them in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for boating at sea, in the river, or on the lake. Canoeing, paddle boarding and the like,

Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix the whistle to your life jacket, backpack, swimsuit, or pocket. The plastic whistles come with a lanyard hole as well so you can use them as a key chain in your survival kit or bug-out bag.

These whistles each measure 2" x .5" x .5" and weigh just .16 ounces. Make sure to grab a set of these for your emergency prepardness and camping gear kits Search Terms: whistle safety emergency plastic camping survival loud waterproof lightweight kit very boating accessories tools hiking tool Features: - HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - The ASR Outdoor boating whistles are made of durable, high-quality plastic that won't rust, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it's super-lightweight, waterproof and will stand the test of time. - SUPER LOUD BOATING WHISTLE - Our waterproof whistles blast a loud noise when blown in order to draw everyone's attention in case of a water emergency. The high-pitched sound can be heard from a long distance, making this an essential safety whistle boating. - HIGH VISIBILITY FLOATING WHISTLE - The lightweight whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate the whistle during an emergency in case you drop it in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for boating at sea, in the river or on the lake. - KEY CHAIN CLIP - Our unique design features a clip on attachment so you can easily affix it to your life jacket, backpack, swimsuit or pocket. The plastic whistle comes with a lanyard hole as well so you can use it as a keychain in your survival kit or bug out bag - SPECIFICATIONS - Adjustable lanyard and clip on attachment; High visibility orange color; Floats in water; Dimensions: 2" x .5" x .5"; Weight: .01lbs or .16oz (lightweight) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pack Orange Floating Emergency Boat Whistle

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-Pk Floating Emergency Boat Whistle

anthropic.title_differentiation: Super Loud, Waterproof, High Visibility, Clip Attachment, Floats In Water, Survival Kit Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Super Loud Signal, Floats In Water, High Visibility Orange, Clip On And Lanyard Hole, Rustproof Plastic
